inline_comments.message: Is there a reason not to use the StandardCoder from policy/commons as the other repos do? specially since I think is used to decode json returned by the pap (provided standardcoder is used there throughout and would deal with the datatypes needed already).

StandardCoder will not work here: gives "Cannot select from parameterized type" error.
See this review for similar situation where Gson was kept: https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/policy/distribution/+/118956/1

Jim Hahn says: "we need a special type adapter for the parameter groups. This seems to indicate a problem with the structure of the parameter group classes, as none of the other repos need a special type adapter for the parameter group classes."
